title: Privacy Policy
seoTitle: Privacy Policy | Prime Pet Food
seoDescription: Read the Prime Pet Food privacy policy, including how customer information, checkout data, cookies, analytics, and privacy choices are handled.
body:
Overview

This Privacy Policy explains how Prime Pet Food collects, uses, shares, and protects information when you visit our website, place an order, contact support, subscribe to emails, or interact with our services. This page is provided for customer transparency and should be reviewed with qualified legal counsel for your specific business obligations.

Information we collect

We may collect contact details such as name, email address, phone number, billing address, shipping address, order details, payment-related checkout information, account information, customer service messages, marketing preferences, device information, browser information, IP address, referring pages, and site activity such as pages viewed and products added to cart.

How we use information

We use information to process and deliver orders, provide order updates, respond to customer questions, prevent fraud, operate and improve the website, personalize shopping experiences, measure marketing performance, send emails or SMS messages when you opt in, maintain business records, and comply with legal obligations.

Checkout, payments, and service providers

Our store is powered by Shopify and may use payment processors, shipping carriers, analytics providers, email marketing tools, customer support tools, fraud prevention tools, and advertising partners. These providers process information as needed to operate the store, complete transactions, provide customer support, deliver packages, and measure website performance.

Cookies and analytics

We and our service providers may use cookies, pixels, tags, and similar technologies to remember preferences, keep the cart working, understand site traffic, improve product pages, and measure advertising. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Some site features may not work correctly if required cookies are blocked.

Marketing communications

If you subscribe to marketing, we may send product updates, chew education, promotions, and enrichment tips. You can unsubscribe using the link in any marketing email or by contacting us through the Contact Us page. Transactional messages about orders, shipping, account activity, or policy updates may still be sent when necessary.

Privacy choices

Depending on where you live, you may have rights to request access, correction, deletion, portability, restriction, or opt out of certain uses of personal information. To make a privacy request, contact us through the Contact Us page and include enough information for us to verify and respond to your request.

Data retention and security

We keep information for as long as needed to provide services, complete transactions, maintain records, resolve disputes, prevent fraud, and meet legal obligations. We use reasonable administrative, technical, and organizational safeguards, but no online system can be guaranteed to be completely secure.

Children

Our website is intended for adults purchasing pet products. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe a child provided personal information, contact us so we can review and remove it where appropriate.

Policy updates

We may update this Privacy Policy as our business, services, legal requirements, or technology change. The updated version will be posted on this page with the latest available update date.

Contact

For privacy questions or requests, please contact Prime Pet Food through the Contact Us page.

title: Refund Policy
seoTitle: Refund Policy | Prime Pet Food Returns
seoDescription: Review the Prime Pet Food refund policy for damaged orders, wrong items, returns, opened pet products, refunds, and the satisfaction guarantee.
body:
Overview

We want you and your dog to feel confident with every Prime Pet Food order. This Refund Policy explains how we handle damaged items, wrong products, returns, refunds, and our satisfaction guarantee for Himalayan yak cheese chews and related pet products.

30-day satisfaction guarantee

If you are not satisfied with your first order, contact us within 30 days of delivery with your order number and a short description of the issue. We may offer a refund, replacement, store credit, sizing guidance, or another reasonable solution depending on the situation.

Damaged, defective, or incorrect items

If your order arrives damaged, defective, missing an item, or different from what you ordered, contact us within 7 days of delivery. Include your order number and clear photos of the item, packaging, and shipping label when possible. We will review the issue and, when approved, provide a replacement, refund, or other resolution.

Returns for edible pet products

For safety and quality reasons, opened edible pet products may not be eligible for a physical return. Unopened products may be eligible for return review within 30 days of delivery if they are unused, sealed, and in their original packaging. Contact us before sending anything back so we can confirm eligibility and provide instructions.

Non-returnable items

Gift cards, final sale items, heavily used items, opened edible products, and products damaged by misuse, improper storage, or normal chewing behavior may not be returnable. This does not limit remedies for items that arrive damaged, defective, or incorrect.

How to request help

To request a refund, replacement, or return review, contact us through the Contact Us page with your order number, email address used at checkout, reason for the request, and photos if the item is damaged, defective, or incorrect.

Return shipping

If a return is approved, we will provide return instructions. Unless the return is due to our error or a damaged or defective item, customers may be responsible for return shipping costs. Shipping fees paid at checkout may be non-refundable unless required by law or unless the issue was caused by our error.

Refund timing

Approved refunds are issued to the original payment method when possible. After we process a refund, your bank, card provider, or payment service may take additional time to post the credit. We do not control bank processing times.

Order changes and cancellations

If you need to change or cancel an order, contact us as soon as possible. We will do our best to help before the order is packed or shipped. Once an order has shipped, it may need to be handled as a return or support request.

Subscriptions

If subscription products are available, subscription changes, skips, pauses, or cancellations should be made before the next order is processed. Contact us if you need help with an active subscription.

Contact

For refund or return questions, contact Prime Pet Food through the Contact Us page.

title: Shipping Policy
seoTitle: Shipping Policy | Prime Pet Food Delivery
seoDescription: Read the Prime Pet Food shipping policy for processing times, delivery estimates, tracking, delayed orders, lost packages, and address changes.
body:
Overview

This Shipping Policy explains how Prime Pet Food processes, ships, tracks, and supports orders for Himalayan yak cheese chews and related pet products. Delivery estimates are not guarantees unless explicitly stated at checkout.

Order processing

Most in-stock orders are prepared for shipment within 1 to 2 business days, excluding weekends and holidays. Processing may take longer during promotions, high-volume periods, weather disruptions, carrier delays, inventory checks, or fraud review.

Shipping rates and free shipping

Available shipping methods, rates, and any free shipping thresholds are shown at checkout before you place your order. Free shipping promotions may apply only to eligible orders, eligible destinations, and qualifying merchandise totals after discounts.

Delivery estimates

Estimated delivery windows depend on the destination, shipping method, carrier, order volume, and external events. After an order ships, the carrier is responsible for transportation scans and final delivery timing. We will provide tracking when available.

Shipping delays

If we learn that we cannot ship an order within the stated timeframe, or within 30 days when no timeframe is stated, we will take appropriate steps such as notifying you, offering a revised shipping estimate, giving you an option to cancel when required, or issuing a refund for unshipped merchandise where required.

Tracking information

When your order ships, tracking information is typically sent by email or SMS if you provided contact information at checkout. Tracking scans can take time to update after a label is created.

Address accuracy

Please review your shipping address carefully before placing an order. If you entered the wrong address, contact us immediately. We can only update the address before the order is packed or shipped. We are not responsible for packages delivered to an address entered incorrectly by the customer.

Lost, stolen, or marked-delivered packages

If tracking shows delivered but you cannot find the package, check around your delivery area, with household members, neighbors, building staff, and the carrier. Contact us if you still need help. We will review each case, but replacement or refund eligibility may depend on carrier status and the circumstances.

Damaged packages

If your package arrives damaged, contact us within 7 days of delivery with your order number and photos of the product, packaging, and shipping label. Keep the packaging until the issue is resolved because the carrier may require it for review.

International shipping

If international shipping is available at checkout, customers are responsible for any customs duties, import taxes, brokerage fees, and local requirements unless otherwise stated. Delivery times may vary due to customs processing.

Contact

For shipping questions, tracking help, or delivery issues, contact Prime Pet Food through the Contact Us page.

title: Terms of Service
seoTitle: Terms of Service | Prime Pet Food
seoDescription: Read the Prime Pet Food terms of service for website use, purchases, product information, accounts, promotions, subscriptions, and limitations.
body:
Overview

These Terms of Service govern your access to and use of the Prime Pet Food website, products, content, checkout, and related services. By using the website or placing an order, you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, do not use the website or purchase products.

Online store terms

You must be old enough to make purchases in your jurisdiction or have permission from a parent or legal guardian. You agree to provide current, complete, and accurate information when placing an order or contacting us.

Product information

We work to present product descriptions, pricing, images, ingredients, availability, and sizing guidance accurately. However, errors may occur. We may correct errors, update information, cancel orders affected by errors, or change product availability at any time where permitted by law.

Pet health and safety

Our content is for general education and shopping guidance only. It is not veterinary advice and does not diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent disease. Always supervise chewing, choose an appropriate size, provide fresh water, remove small end pieces, and ask your veterinarian if your dog has dental issues, allergies, digestive concerns, medical conditions, or a history of swallowing chews.

Orders and payment

By placing an order, you authorize the payment method used at checkout. We may refuse, cancel, limit, or review orders when necessary due to suspected fraud, payment issues, inventory errors, pricing errors, shipping restrictions, or policy violations.

Shipping, returns, and refunds

Shipping, return, and refund details are explained in our Shipping Policy and Refund Policy. Those policies are incorporated into these Terms of Service by reference.

Subscriptions and promotions

If subscription options are available, subscription pricing, renewal timing, cancellation options, and other terms will be presented before checkout or in your account tools. Promotions, discounts, bundles, and free shipping offers may have eligibility requirements and may change or end at any time.

Website use

You agree not to misuse the website, interfere with site security, attempt unauthorized access, scrape content without permission, upload malicious code, impersonate others, or use the website for unlawful activity.

Intellectual property

Website content, including text, images, product names, branding, design, and graphics, is owned by or licensed to Prime Pet Food and may not be copied, modified, distributed, or used commercially without permission.

Third-party services

Our website may use third-party platforms and services for checkout, payments, shipping, analytics, marketing, reviews, support, or embedded content. Those services may have their own terms and privacy practices.

Limitation of liability

To the fullest extent permitted by law, Prime Pet Food is not liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from website use, product use, shipping delays, or inability to access services. Some jurisdictions do not allow certain limitations, so some terms may not apply to you.

Changes to these terms

We may update these Terms of Service from time to time. Updated terms will be posted on this page. Continued use of the website after updates means you accept the revised terms.

Contact

For questions about these Terms of Service, contact Prime Pet Food through the Contact Us page.
